channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Dave Matthews Band Open 2026 Tour by Digging Deep into Their Catalog
item.description: 🎶 Rock legends Dave Matthews Band kick off 2026 tour with a deep dive into their classic hits! Who's ready to jam? 🤘 #DMB2026 #MusicLegends

item.title: Noah Kahan Brings Emotional, Rousing Balladry to SNL: Watch
item.description: 🎤🌟 Tune in for a soul-stirring performance by @NoahKahan on SNL! Get ready to feel all the feels. #NoahKahan #SNLperformance 🎶✨

item.title: Charli XCX Drops New Song “I Keep On Thinking Bout You Every Single Day and Night”
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the catchy new bop from Charli XCX! 💃🎉 Let it be your anthem! #CharliXCX #NewMusicAlert 🎵

item.title: EsDeeKid Makes Medieval-Themed Rolling Loud Debut With Rico Ace, New Song “Rock Wave”
item.description: 🔥⚔️ Get ready to groove through time with EsDeeKid's medieval Rolling Loud debut ft. Rico Ace and their new track "Rock Wave"! 🎶 #RockWaveMEDievalMadness

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers Premieres New Music at First Solo Show Since 2023
item.description: 🎶 Phoebe Bridgers lights up the stage with fresh tunes at her long-awaited solo show! 🔥🎵 #PhoebeBridgers #NewMusicPremiere
